A compact work desk with one chair. Desk — Top: slim rectangular top with softly rounded corners, matte charcoal black surface; thin edge profile (≈18–22 mm). Details: cylindrical legs, minimal hardware; back posts pass above the backrest slightly. Tabletop items (include as placed):
Center-left: amber glass tumbler/vase with faceted/pressed texture (primary #C27A25, highlight #E8B264, shadow #815013).
Right-rear: stack of two books—top white book, below a yellow book (spine visible; no readable titles).

A low round floor coffee table  in a calm modern living room. A sculptural organic coffee table, featuring: A gently curved, triangular tempered-glass top with softly rounded edges and a subtle smoke tint. A minimalist two-tier round coffee table with a clear tempered-glass top and a smoked-gray tempered-glass lower shelf *(top: 10–12 mm; shelf: 8–10 mm; polished edges; top = perfectly transparent, shelf tint ≈ #7B8085)*. A minimalist solid-wood writing desk in walnut (primary #6F462B, highlight #8D5C3A, shadow #3A2316) with a matte/oil finish and clear straight grain. A racetrack-oval dining table with a thin matte seafoam/green top (≈ #79B59A) and a light birch/beige edge reveal (2–3 mm). Top size ≈ 160–180(W) × 80–90(D) × 18–22(t) mm; soft 6–8 mm radius at the rim. Supported by two round brushed-metal columns (Ø 55–65 mm) each on a four-star cast base in satin aluminum; slightly upturned, flat feet with black end caps. Overall height 72–75 cm. Add two armless bent-ply side chairs that complement it: warm oak-veneer shells (subtle saddle seat, rounded-rectangle back), polished chrome tube legs with black glides; optional thin seat pad in warm ivory (#F5F1E8); seat height ~45 cm. A minimalist white round side table in a serene bedroom setting, featuring: A smooth, matte-finish circular tabletop holding a closed silver laptop, a folded beige linen pouch, and a sleek triangular stand for a phone or tablet. Supported by a single slender tubular metal pedestal leg positioned centrally beneath the tabletop, creating generous under-table clearance and an airy silhouette. A compact mid-century writing desk with a thin white matte laminate worktop (exposed wood edge) and curved walnut bent-ply side panels that rise slightly above the top to cradle an organizer shelf (satin walnut ≈ #855A35).

Crisp edges, satin clear finish on walnut, no additional props, no branding or logos.
